topic: Profit moonshot return-quality alpha discovery: find stable train/validation-selected candidate with >=2% monthlyized train/val/OOS returns, OOS MDD <=25%, high Sharpe/Sortino/smart Sortino/Calmar, locked-OOS report/gate-only, <8GiB memory
rubric: Professor-critic passes only if the mission validator passes and artifacts prove train/validation-only selection, locked-OOS report/gate-only, train/validation/OOS monthlyized return >=2%, OOS MDD <=25%, OOS Sharpe >=2, Sortino >=3, smart Sortino >=3, Calmar >=1, OOS return and return/risk improvement over current champion, full local tests, private/main push, and GitHub Actions ci/private-ci green.
